name: Faceless YouTube & Clip Maker
tagline: Faceless YouTube automation — AI script generation, voiceover synthesis, clip assembly, and scheduled publishing pipeline
description: End-to-end faceless YouTube video production. AI generates scripts, synthesizes voiceover, assembles clips, adds captions and overlays, and queues for publishing. No face, no voice, no manual editing. Content factory for YouTube automation at scale.
content_angles: Zero manual editing: AI handles script → voice → video → publish
Content factory model: produce daily videos with no human in the loop
Faceless YouTube is a $0-cost business with AI doing the production
